name: pilot-sql
description: SQL Server / EF Core codebase governance: schema design (naming, key strategy, constraints, stored-procedure source control), injection defense, migration safety checks, multitenancy isolation, query/performance review, index gap analysis, PII data protection (Always Encrypted, Dynamic Data Masking, TDE verification), ongoing index/statistics maintenance, and backup/restore-drill verification. Ships a reviewer, implementor, and support agent trio: @sql-reviewer finds violations, @sql-implementor fixes them, @sql-support diagnoses query/migration/blocking issues to root cause

enable_migration_verifier.title: Enable migration safety verifier
enable_migration_verifier.description: When false, disables the PreToolUse hook that blocks destructive EF Core migrations (DropColumn/DropTable/AlterColumn) lacking a pilot-sql approval annotation and warns on new tables without a tenant identifier.

enable_query_filter_check.title: Enable HasQueryFilter coverage check
enable_query_filter_check.description: When false, disables the advisory check that warns when a new CreateTable migration is written but no DbContext in the project contains a HasQueryFilter call. Cost: reads up to 10 .cs files from the project root and src/.
